name: Siranjeevi E
title: Computer Science Engineering Student | Full-Stack Developer | Data & AI Enthusiast
summary: Passionate software developer with hands-on experience in full-stack development, data analytics, and AI. Proven track record through internships, hackathons, and competitive programming. Focused on building practical solutions that solve real-world problems.

projects.title: Elder Voice Command Assistant
projects.problem: Elderly individuals often struggle with complex digital interfaces.
projects.solution: A voice-activated assistant using Deep Neural Networks to perform daily tasks.

projects.title: Real-Time Object Detection System
projects.problem: Need for efficient, real-time surveillance and monitoring.
projects.solution: High-performance object detection system utilizing state-of-the-art YOLOv8 architecture.
projects.application: Security systems and automated inventory management.

projects.title: GameVaultX
projects.problem: Gamers often struggle to find detailed game information, system requirements, and personalized game recommendations in a single platform.
projects.solution: Developed a full-stack gaming platform that allows users to explore games, view detailed information, filter by genres, and access system requirement details through an interactive interface.
projects.application: Gaming discovery and recommendation platform for players seeking comprehensive game insights and browsing experiences.

experience.description: Worked on production-level applications, implementing scalable frontend architectures and robust backend APIs.
Analyzed complex datasets to derive actionable insights, utilizing Python libraries for data visualization and processing.
Executed email marketing campaigns, managed subscriber lists, tracked campaign performance metrics, and supported digital marketing initiatives to improve customer engagement and lead generation.

achievements: Hackathon rankings performer in regional coding marathons.
Competitive programming statistics high ratings on coding platforms.
Innovation competition finalist for practical IoT solutions.
